ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: (Wheat Flour [Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin], Water, During Wheat Semolina, Yeast, Rapeseed Oil, Salt, Sugar, Dried Wholemeal Spelt Wheat Sourdough), 21% Tomato Sauce (Tomatoes, Water, Salt, Sunflower Oil, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Dried Herbs, Dried Garlic), 15% Edam Cheese (Milk), 15% Emmental Cheese (Milk).
